title: AI Tool Specification
description: Contract every AlphaSoft AI tool must satisfy. Backend source of truth: Modules\Ai\Contracts\AiToolContract. Tools are the ONLY way AI reaches tenant data.

name.description: snake_case tool name, unique across the registry (e.g. catalog_search, pos_top_selling_items).

module_scope.description: ERP module this tool belongs to. Must appear in config('ai.enabled_modules') to be exposed.

description.description: Model-facing description. Written for the LLM, not for humans.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema (object type) for tool input. Keep parameters few and typed; clamp limits server-side regardless.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's return array. PLANNED (not yet in AiToolContract). Rule regardless: minimal task-specific fields, aggregates over records, never customer PII.

permission.description: Must match an entry in the module's config/permissions.php. Enforced by AiToolRegistry when config('ai.enforce_permissions') is true.

action_level.description: Governance level per ai-planning/03. Launch scope permits read_only, recommendation, draft only. draft-level tools MUST write via ai_suggestions, never directly.

logs_tool_call.description: Every dispatch writes an ai_tool_calls row. Non-negotiable.

emits_activity_event.description: True for tools whose applied effects must appear in the tenant activity log.
